_comment: 10 个 DTC 投放方向博主。Grace 可手动增删,改完后重跑 scripts/01_collect_video_urls.sh。verify=true 表示 channel handle 还需肉眼确认。

channels.name: Dara Denney
channels.role: DTC creative testing 教母, ex-Tinuiti creative strategist
channels.why: 讲 creative testing / hook rate / thumbnail-stop 最系统, DTC 视角最纯, 不卖课狗血

channels.name: Andy Stauring
channels.why: Meta Advantage+ 改版后最早一批吃透的 practitioner, 案例多

channels.name: Konstantinos Doulgeridis
channels.why: live ad account 演示 scaling/downscaling 决策过程, 极少见的真实操作画面

channels.name: Ben Heath
channels.role: 入门到中阶系统教学, Heath Media agency 老板
channels.why: 覆盖 targeting / 结构 / 文案最全, 500K+ 订阅, 入门补盲必看

channels.name: Evan Seech
channels.role: Meta ads + 漏斗 + B2B/coaching DTC
channels.why: Conversion API / match rate / 漏斗 conversion mechanism 讲得细

channels.name: Jyll Saskin Gales
channels.role: ex-Google 6 年, Google Ads coach #1 PPC influencer
channels.why: P-Max / Search 框架最稳, 8 个 Google Ads cert + GA4 cert, 不掺水

channels.name: Aaron Young
channels.role: Define Digital Academy 创始人, e-com Google Ads 实操派
channels.why: #1 Google Ads YouTube channel (130K+ subs), 实操步骤极细

channels.name: Ed Leake
channels.role: Midas Media 14 年 agency owner, $500M+ ad spend managed
channels.why: 反套路, Smart Bidding scaling 框架 (God Tier Ads), 不爱搞 hype

channels.name: Miles & Bob — PPC Mastery
channels.role: Miles McNair + Bob, PPC Hub 社群创始人
channels.why: Demand Gen / SST / enhanced conversions / 现代 Search 结构最有体系, 长视频干货

channels.name: Andrew Lolk
channels.role: SavvyRevenue 创始人, e-com Google Ads only ($10K-$1M/月 客户)
channels.why: 只做 e-com, 挑战 Google 官方 best practice, AI 分析 PPC data 系列, DTC 场景命中率高
